case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. ALLEN HUGHES et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HUGHES, ALLEN IND AND DBA HUGHES SURVEYING DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-19-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-22-2002

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED JAN-09-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUGHES, ALLEN IND AND DBA HUGHES SURVEYING
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUGHES, ALLEN IND AND DBA HUGHES SURVEYING POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 TOPCON 226-D TOTAL STATION ; 1 PRISM WITH TARGET; 1 PRISM BAG; 1 PRISM POLE 8' ETC., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $5,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $7,307.46 DAMAGES, $1,075.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $171.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,553.46, INTEREST $ 132.00 TOTAL $ 8,685.46 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-19-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
